articles.title: Cardano Summit Sees Launch Of Exciting New Partnerships
articles.description: The Cardano Summit has now officially come to an end. Saturday and Sunday saw live and virtual events from around the world, while notable figures in the crypto space spoke at the event, including the founder of Cardano Charles Hoskinson. The event brought a lot of excitement to the space and allowed community members to interact with one another from around the world. But most notable has...

articles.title: Top Trader Predicts Rallies in Avalanche and Two More Altcoins, Says Bottom Is In for Ethereum
articles.description: A closely followed crypto trader is predicting a rally in smart contract platform Avalanche (AVAX) and two more altcoins, and also says that the bottom is in for Ethereum (ETH). The pseudonymous trader known as Altcoin Sherpa tells his 128,000 followers on Twitter that he has his eye on AVAX, and even though the crypto […]

articles.title: 65% of working Americans are willing to be paid in Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin
articles.description: To explore how Americans view cryptocurrencies as a form of workplace compensation, research and survey firm Skynova spoke to more than 1,000 working professionals, including 797 employees and 205 managers.

articles.title: In a first, DEX platform dYdX surpasses Coinbase in trade volumes
articles.description: “Virtual currency-related business activities are illegal financial activities…seriously endangers the safety of people’s assets.” This was the statement released a couple of days ago by the People’s Bank of China. Post China’s renewed ban on cryptocurrencies, the price of Bitcoin fell by more than $2,000. The overall crypto market cap also took a hit. However, […]

articles.title: Alibaba says it will block sales of cryptocurrency mining equipment starting next month
articles.description: Chinese e-commerce giant Alibaba said Monday that, beginning on October 8, it will halt the sales of cryptocurrency mining equipment on its platform.

articles.title: Cardano, Chainlink Primed to Dip Despite Partnership
Permissioned DeFi platform Aave Arc gears up for launch
articles.description: Fireblocks has made a proposal to Aave's governance body, signalling that Aave Arc is getting ready to go live.

articles.title: Former US Treasurer Says BTC and ETH Are Speculative, Backs XRP Instead
articles.description: Rosie Rios implies that XRP is superior to Bitcoin and Ethereum (among other cryptocurrencies). But is this true?

articles.title: Can meme-coins like SHIB, ELON, SMI pump Dogecoin back to life
articles.description: Over the past 30-odd hours, both Bitcoin and Ethereum have been trading in green. In effect, most of the other alts have also kickstarted their respective rallies. On any usual day, meme-coins aren’t considered to be a part of the broader crypto-equation. However, people from their respective communities have started proclaiming that the rallies of […]

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Partners With Chainlink (LINK) for Oracle Services
articles.description: Cardano has announced a partnership with oracle solutions provider Chainlink to accelerate the development of its DeFi ecosystem. The news was released at the Cardano Summit, a two-day conference held last weekend.

articles.title: Ethereum’s Second-Largest Mining Pool to Shut Down on Sept 30 Amid China Regulatory Pressure
articles.description: The Chinese crackdown on the cryptocurrency industry has taken another victim - this time, the Ethereum mining pool Sparkpool.

articles.title: Ethereum Developer Accused of Helping North Korea Pleads Guilty
articles.description: Virgil Griffith has reached a guilty plea deal with federal prosecutors

articles.title: Bitfinex Pays $23 Million ETH Fee on $100,000 USDt Transfer
articles.description: One of the biggest crypto exchange, Bitfinex, has paid 7,676 eth, worth $23.5 million, to transfer $100,000 USDt from Bitfinex’s account to DeversiFi, a dapp by Bitfinex. The transfer was...

articles.title: Second-largest Ethereum mining pool to suspend all operations
articles.description: Launched in China in 2018, SparkPool controls over 22% of Ether’s hash rate as of Monday, second only to Ethermine.

articles.title: Bitfinex Paid Over $23 Million in ETH Fees to Send $100K Worth of USDT
articles.description: Bitfinex spent a whopping $23.6 million in fees in a single transaction on Ethereum's blockchain.

articles.title: Bitfinex just spent $23.7 million in fees to make a single Ethereum transaction
articles.description: A wallet belonging to crypto exchange Bitfinex mistakenly spent an outrageous amount of money to move just $100,000.

articles.title: Former US Treasurer Lauds XRP As The Only Cryptocurrency With Real Intrinsic Value
articles.description: Rosie Rios has critiqued other cryptocurrencies, equating them to only speculative assets whose value is only dependent upon suppositious grounds as opposed to XRP. According to a tweet posted on Sunday, the former treasurer of the United States lauded XRP, positing that it was the only cryptocurrency with real use-case as opposed to other cryptocurrencies, […]

articles.title: China-based Ethereum mining pool Sparkpool shuts down all services
articles.description: Ethereum mining pool Sparkpool will stop its services for both China and overseas customers in response to China's harsher crackdown.

articles.title: Investors need to know this about Avalanche, Tezos, Algorand
articles.description: With Bitcoin noting over 5% gains at the time of writing over the last six hours, the market seemed to pick up the pace again. However, the likes of AVAX and Tezos depicted an independent trajectory even as BTC and the larger market dropped. On the other hand, Algorand which made promising moves initially seemed […]

articles.title: XRP is for payments, Bitcoin for ‘speculation,’ says former US Treasurer
articles.description: After joining Ripple’s board of directors in May, Rosa Rios is bashing Bitcoin for being a supposed speculative tool.

articles.title: dYdX Overtakes Coinbase in Trading Volumes
articles.description: The decentralized crypto exchange, dYdX, has overtaken Coinbase, America’s biggest crypto broker and exchange. dYdX handled $4 billion in trading volumes on Sunday, $1 billion more than Coinbase handled in...

articles.title: dYdX Trading Volume Surpasses Coinbase’s: DYDX Paints New ATH
articles.description: DYDX has surged to a new all-time high above $22 as the trading volume on the DEX has surpassed that of Coinbase in the past 24 hours.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) developers can now leverage Chainlink for better smart contracts
articles.description: Cardano is scaling up its decentralized finance (DeFi) smart contract development with a new partnership with Chainlink who will be providing the upgraded crypto asset with its oracle integration services for developers on the ecosystem.

articles.title: Former U.S. Treasurer Praises XRP While Dismissing Other Cryptocurrencies
articles.description: Rosie Rios chooses XRP over other cryptocurrencies, but there’s a catch

articles.title: Derivatives DEX dYdX beats out Coinbase’s spot markets by volume amid China FUD
articles.description: Chinese traders appear to be flocking to derivatives DEX dYdX amid concerns over a renewed crypto crackdown in China.

articles.title: TA: Bitcoin Forms Bullish Pattern, Why BTC Could Rally above $45K
articles.description: Bitcoin price stayed above the key $40,750 support zone against the US Dollar. BTC is rising and it could soon rally above the $45,000 resistance. Bitcoin started a recovery wave above the $42,800 and $43,000 resistance levels. The price is now trading above $43,000 and the 100 hourly simple moving average. There was a break above a connecting bearish trend line with resistance near $42,400 on...
